allow: PowerShell($body = @{ symbol = 'AAPL'; market = 'us'; period = 'daily'; startDate = '2024-01-01'; endDate = '2024-12-31'; strategyId = 'bullishLong' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:18185/api/backtest/run' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { throw } })

PowerShell(for \($i = 0; $i -lt 60; $i++\) { try { $client = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient]::new\(\); $client.Connect\('localhost', 18185\); $client.Dispose\(\); Write-Output 'ready'; exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } finally { if \($client\) { $client.Dispose\(\) } } }; throw 'temporary backtest service did not become ready')

PowerShell($body = @{ symbol = 'AAPL'; market = 'us'; period = 'daily'; startDate = '2024-01-01'; endDate = '2024-12-31'; strategyId = 'bullishLong' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:18185/api/backtest/run' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); exit 1 } else { throw } })

PowerShell($body = @{ symbol = 'AAPL'; market = 'us'; period = 'daily'; startDate = '2018-01-18'; endDate = '2026-05-18' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8182/api/market-data/kline?symbol=AAPL&market=us&period=daily&startDate=2018-01-18&endDate=2026-05-18' -Method Get; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { throw } })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8182/api/market-data/kline?symbol=AAPL&market=us&period=daily&startDate=2018-01-18&endDate=2026-05-18' -Method Get; $response.Count } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { throw } })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8182/api/market-data/kline?symbol=AAPL&market=us&period=daily&startDate=2018-01-18&endDate=2026-05-18' -Method Get; "count=$\($response.Count\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { throw } })

PowerShell(try { $uri = 'http://localhost:8181/api/web/kline?symbol=AAPL&market=us&period=daily&startDate=2018-01-18&endDate=2026-05-18'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $uri -Method Get; "count=$\($response.klines.Count\); total=$\($response.totalCount\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { throw } })

PowerShell(try { $client = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient]::new\(\); $client.Connect\('localhost', 3000\); $client.Dispose\(\); Write-Output 'port 3000 ready' } catch { Write-Output 'port 3000 not ready' })
PowerShell(node -e "try { require\('playwright'\); console.log\('node playwright ready'\) } catch \(error\) { console.error\(error.message\); process.exit\(1\) }")
